name: Haunted Dungeon Decor — 39 Furniture & Props | Pixel Art Game Assets
description:
**🪑 39 HAND-CRAFTED DUNGEON FURNITURE & PROP SPRITES — Fill Your Dungeon With Atmosphere! 🪑**

From humble barrels and stools to regal thrones and magical portals — everything you need to make your dungeon feel alive. **All sprites CC0 licensed — use in commercial projects, no credit needed!**

---

**📦 WHAT'S INSIDE:**

**🛏️ Furniture (11)**
Bed (with blanket), wooden bench, armchair, stools (tall & short), tables (small, long, round), ornate throne, bookshelf, wooden cabinet

**🗝️ Props (12)**
Candelabra (lit), hanging chain, cobweb cluster, glowing crystal, lantern (lit), cave mushrooms, wall torch (lit), torn tapestry, wooden sign post, ladder, stairs (up), stairs (down)

**⚙️ Traps & Mechanics (6)**
Pressure plate, spike trap (retracted), spike trap (extended), lever (off), lever (on), magic portal, **MIMIC CHEST** 👀

**🪣 Atmosphere & Storage (10)**
Blacksmith anvil, wooden barrel, bones pile, wooden crate, crate stack (2-high), gravestone (weathered), wishing well, loose skull, skull pile, femur bones

---

**✅ ALL SPRITES:**
- 39 unique sprites (16×16 pixels)
- Transparent PNGs — ready for any engine
- **CC0 LICENSE — commercial use, no credit required!**

**🎨 STYLE:** 0x72 Dungeon Tileset inspired with Haunted Spectral palette
**🏆 Curator Score: 8.3/10 — Approved with Distinction!**

**💀 Perfect for:** RPGs, dungeon crawlers, adventure games, horror games, game jams, and filling empty rooms with believable dungeon clutter!
